ddls:
CREATE TABLE "commands" (
  "command_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each command */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the command */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the command's purpose */,
  "command_switch" TEXT /* Command switch for usage in terminal */,
  "example_usage" TEXT /* Example usage of the command */,
  "used_with" TEXT /* Other commands that can be used with this command */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the command was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the command */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the command is active and can be used */,
  "command_type" TEXT /* Type of command (e.g., encryption, decryption, signature verification) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("command_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, analyst, user) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the user account */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user account is active */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "failed_login_attempts" INTEGER /* Number of failed login attempts */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "command_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who executed the command */,
  "command_id" INTEGER /* ID of the command that was executed */,
  "execution_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the command was executed */,
  "parameters" TEXT /* Parameters provided during command execution */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the command execution */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the command was executed */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the client used to execute the command */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the command execution in milliseconds */,
  "status_code" INTEGER /* Status code indicating the result of the command execution (e.g., 0 for success, 1 for failure) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_command_logs_command_id FOREIGN KEY ("command_id") REFERENCES commands ("command_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_command_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* List of permissions associated with the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the role was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user-role mapping */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role assigned to the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the user-role mapping was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the user-role mapping */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "command_templates" (
  "template_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each command template */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the template */,
  "command_id" INTEGER /* ID of the command associated with the template */,
  "template_name" TEXT /* Name of the command template */,
  "template_parameters" TEXT /* Parameters used in the command template */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the template was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the template */,
  "is_shared" INTEGER /* Indicates if the template is shared with other users */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("template_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_command_templates_command_id FOREIGN KEY ("command_id") REFERENCES commands ("command_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_command_templates_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "command_errors" (
  "error_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each error log */,
  "log_id" INTEGER /* ID of the log entry associated with the error */,
  "error_message" TEXT /* Error message encountered during execution */,
  "error_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the error occurred */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the error log was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the error log */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("error_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_command_errors_log_id FOREIGN KEY ("log_id") REFERENCES command_logs ("log_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the permission */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the permission was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "role_permissions" (
  "role_permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role-permission mapping */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* ID of the permission assigned to the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the role-permission mapping was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the role-permission mapping */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_role_permissions_permission_id FOREIGN KEY ("permission_id") REFERENCES permissions ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_role_permissions_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)
